sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103612" key="tetro/rguios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρ-όργυιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103612.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of four fathoms,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.223</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.): cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τετρώρυγος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
